metadata.title: O Little Town of Bethlehem
metadata.subtitle: Phillips Brooks (1868) — St. Louis tune by Lewis Redner
metadata.x_pd_basis: Brooks (d. 1893) and Redner (d. 1908) are PD by > 100 years. First published 1870
